prompt: Simulate an outbound call where Sarah calls Lisa Nguyen in Catherine Field. Lisa says 'Not interested', then 'I already have an agent.' Sarah handles objections, asks referral question, captures referral details, closes gracefully.

assertions.text: Agent responds to 'not interested' with a discovery pivot ('Any property plans in the next year?'), not pressure
Agent acknowledges existing agent relationship respectfully without badmouthing competitors
Agent does not push beyond two genuine attempts at any single objection
Agent asks if prospect knows anyone looking to buy or sell (referral ask)
Agent captures referral name (Dave Morrison) and phone number
No fake urgency, guilt, manipulative emotional appeals, or pressure tactics used
Call ends warmly without burning the bridge ('If anything changes, Multi Dynamic is always here')
Tool execution follows correct order: log_call_outcome → end_call
